2026-04-13T18:59:28.6221659Z ---
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6222211Z description: |
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6222877Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6227707Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6229171Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6229782Z 
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6229976Z on:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6230348Z   push:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6230737Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6231181Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6231457Z 
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6231644Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6231922Z 
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6232101Z network: defaults
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6232352Z 
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6232527Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6233407Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6234380Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6234798Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6235178Z   noop:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6235569Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6236040Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6236416Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6237140Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6237986Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6238472Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6238968Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6239806Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6240221Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6240615Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6240991Z       steps:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6241426Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6241949Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6242428Z           env:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6243027Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6252048Z           with:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6255113Z             script: |
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6258823Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6259798Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6261575Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6262203Z                 return;
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6264442Z               }
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6264732Z 
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6265466Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6266572Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6271529Z 
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6275756Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6365659Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6366589Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6367910Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6368538Z               }
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6368764Z 
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6369620Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6370267Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6370746Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6371277Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6371774Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6372578Z               });
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6373115Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);

2026-04-13T18:59:28.6438337Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6439124Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6439390Z 
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6439567Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6439822Z 
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6439992Z network: defaults
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6440216Z 
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6440374Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6440774Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6441563Z   create-issue:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6442388Z     max: 1
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6442750Z   noop:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6443439Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6444102Z   jobs:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6444451Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6445412Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6446879Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6447338Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6448114Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6449060Z       permissions:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6450071Z         actions: write
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6451291Z         issues: write
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6451687Z       steps:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6452076Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6453296Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6482301Z           env:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6483059Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6484313Z           with:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6484713Z             script: |
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6485249Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6485907Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6486577Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6488684Z                 return;
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6489081Z               }
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6489305Z 
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6489537Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6490260Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6490770Z 
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6491211Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6492050Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6493208Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6494612Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6495221Z               }
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6495437Z 
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6495703Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6496390Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6496851Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6497370Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6497841Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6498350Z               });
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6498837Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6499882Z 
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6500039Z tools:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6500380Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6500784Z   github:
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6501146Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6501443Z 
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6501609Z timeout-minutes: 15
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6502182Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6502860Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-13T18:59:28.6514513Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
